Module com.cuatrifasico.battleshi
Package com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities

Class GameSession

java.lang.Object
com.cuatrifasico.battleshi.model.entities.GameSession
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class GameSession extends Object implements Serializable
Serializable snapshot of a complete, in-progress Battle Shi match.

This is the single object written to (and read from) the binary .dat save file. It groups every piece of mutable state that must survive an application restart:

  • Both players (with their Board instances embedded).
  • The current GameState.
  • A flag indicating whose turn it is.
  • The full shot history as a LinkedList of Shot objects (one of the four required non-array data structures).

Only matches in state GameState.IN_PROGRESS are persisted; GameState.PLACEMENT, GameState.PLAYER_WON and GameState.MACHINE_WON are never written to disk (see the save/load rules in the project specification).

See Also:

  • Field Details

    • serialVersionUID

      private static final long serialVersionUID
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • humanPlayer

      private final HumanPlayer humanPlayer

    • machinePlayer

      private final MachinePlayer machinePlayer

    • gameState

      private GameState gameState

    • humanTurn

      private boolean humanTurn

    • shotHistory

      private final LinkedList<Shot> shotHistory
      Ordered history of every shot fired in the match, used to reconstruct the visual board state after loading a saved game. LinkedList is chosen here to satisfy the project's requirement for four distinct non-array data structures; it gives O(1) append (the only operation needed during play) and preserves insertion order for replay.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameSession

      public GameSession(HumanPlayer humanPlayer, MachinePlayer machinePlayer, GameState gameState, boolean humanTurn)
      Creates a new session from the two players, the starting state, and the starting turn.
      Parameters:
      humanPlayer - The human player (board already populated during placement).
      machinePlayer - The machine player (board pre-populated with random fleet).
      gameState - The initial game state; must be GameState.IN_PROGRESS before saving.
      humanTurn - true if it is the human's turn first.

  • Method Details

    • getHumanPlayer

      public HumanPlayer getHumanPlayer()
      Returns:
      The human player.

    • getMachinePlayer

      public MachinePlayer getMachinePlayer()
      Returns:
      The machine player.

    • getGameState

      public GameState getGameState()
      Returns:
      The current game state.

    • setGameState

      public void setGameState(GameState gameState)
      Updates the game state (e.g. to GameState.PLAYER_WON or GameState.MACHINE_WON when the match ends).
      Parameters:
      gameState - The new state.

    • isHumanTurn

      public boolean isHumanTurn()
      Returns:
      true if it is currently the human player's turn.

    • toggleTurn

      public void toggleTurn()
      Switches the active turn between human and machine.

    • setHumanTurn

      public void setHumanTurn(boolean humanTurn)
      Sets which player's turn it is explicitly (used when loading a saved session).
      Parameters:
      humanTurn - true to make it the human's turn.

    • recordShot

      public void recordShot(Shot shot)
      Appends a shot to the history log.
      Parameters:
      shot - The shot to record.

    • getShotHistory

      public LinkedList<Shot> getShotHistory()
      Returns:
      The full shot history in chronological order (unmodifiable view).
